query:
INSERT INTO agents (
  ownerId, agentName, developerName, description, capabilities, endpointUrl,
  averageLatency, pricingModel, status, connectionTested, domain,
  isBuiltIn, isCustom, version, createdAt, updatedAt
) VALUES (
  1,
  'ETF Launch Studio',
  'AgenThinkMesh Platform',
  'AI-powered ETF design and launch workflow for Boursa Kuwait. Covers fund configuration, Shariah screening (AAOIFI Std 21), macro overlay, factor scoring, 10-year walk-forward backtest, and NAV accounting — in a single guided 5-stage session.',
  '["etf-design","shariah-screening","backtesting","nav-accounting","factor-analysis","boursa-kuwait","index-construction"]',
  '/agents/etf-studio',
  800,
  'free',
  'active',
  TRUE,
  'Finance',
  TRUE,
  FALSE,
  '1.0.0',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
